title: ApprovedScopePaths
description: Session plan enforced by governance-check.sh. Owned by orchestrator only.

repo.description: Repository name this plan applies to

owner_agent.description: Only the orchestrator may own the session plan

approved_scope_paths.description: Glob or prefix patterns of paths approved for write in this session

created_at.description: ISO 8601 datetime when plan was initialized

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 datetime of last scope expansion (optional)
